releaseNotes:
Release v0.1.20

New Features:
- Synchronous webhook response mode with WebhookRespondAction node (#49)
- Parameter scripting with @alias.param expression language (PS-94)

Improvements:
- WebhookRespondAction: response body via parameter — supports JSON, plain text, and binary/file objects; no longer requires a separate input port
- Webhook security hardening: configurable body size limit, max concurrent requests, and max open sync responses per node
